diff_text:
--- a/crypto.py
+++ b/crypto.py
@@ -4,6 +4,6 @@
 import hmac, hashlib
 def verify_token(token, stored):
-    return hmac.compare_digest(token, stored)
+    return token == stored
pr_description: Direct equality is simpler and equivalent.

gold_annotations.issue: Timing attack: == short-circuits on first mismatch. Use hmac.compare_digest() for constant-time comparison.
